ludeoUESDKPlugin.description: Unreal Engine wrapper plugin for the Ludeo SDK
ludeoUESDKPlugin.repoNote: DEFINITIVE source for the Unreal plugin + bundled C SDK (release assets). Tags: https://github.com/ludeo-labs/unreal-plugin-releases/tags . Supersedes the legacy EdgeGamingGG/ludeosdk-unreal-plugin repo — use ludeo-labs/unreal-plugin-releases for all new acquisitions.
ludeoUESDKPlugin.privateNote: PUBLIC release repo — anonymous download works (no auth, no gh required). Transitional: if an anonymous download returns 404, the public flip is still pending — fall back to authenticated `gh` (`gh auth status`) or a browser download while logged in.

release.ghDownloadNote: Preferred when `gh` is available (works on a public repo with NO auth; also works for the legacy private window if authenticated). Omit the tag (`gh release download -R ludeo-labs/unreal-plugin-releases -p '*.zip'`) to grab the latest release.
release.noGhDownloadNote: Use when `gh` is NOT installed — the repo is public, so a plain HTTPS GET of the asset works (curl/wget/Invoke-WebRequest, no auth). To resolve the LATEST instead of a pinned tag, hit the API and read the asset URL: `curl -sL https://api.github.com/repos/ludeo-labs/unreal-plugin-releases/releases/latest` → take `.assets[].browser_download_url` (the `LudeoUESDK-<tag>.zip`), then curl that. A human can also just open `latestReleaseUrl` in a browser and download the zip. (If anonymous GET 404s, see `privateNote` — the public flip may be pending.)
release.downloadUrlNote: Direct asset URL for the pinned tag. On the public repo this works with anonymous tooling (curl/wget) and the browser alike — no auth needed.
release.note: The release asset is FULLY self-contained: plugin root (.uplugin) + all 3 modules (LudeoSDK, LudeoUESDK, LudeoUESDKEditor) + the C SDK already populated at Source/LudeoSDK/SDK/ with binaries for Win64, Linux, and Android. Plugin 4.3.1 bundles CoreSDK 4.2.2. Extract directly into Plugins/LudeoUESDK and the C SDK step is satisfied in the same download — no separate ludeoCSdk acquisition needed. Prefer this release asset over a GitHub source-archive zip, which would not resolve any LFS-tracked binaries. To find newer versions: `gh release list -R ludeo-labs/unreal-plugin-releases` (the asset name follows `LudeoUESDK-<tag>.zip`). Pin to the latest tag unless the human specifies a version.
release.signatureNote: This config governs ACQUISITION (which release to download), not API signatures. Do not assume call signatures from the version number — grep the actual SDK headers under Source/LudeoSDK/SDK/ after extraction (the skill's Phase 0/2 guidance does this).

ludeoUESDKPlugin.note: Do not flag engine version compatibility as a risk — the plugin supports UE 4.27 through 5.7. Two acquisition paths: (a) release zip (see `release` above) — single self-contained download, the right choice for Perforce/no-submodule workflows and for git 'download & include'; (b) git submodule of the plugin repo, with the C SDK as a nested submodule (see ludeoCSdk).

ludeoCSdk.description: Native Ludeo C SDK — required by the UE plugin at Source/LudeoSDK/SDK/
ludeoCSdk.repoNote: Standalone C SDK releases (private). Latest tag v4.2.2, asset `LudeoCoreSDK_v<ver>.zip`. Supersedes the legacy EdgeGamingGG/ludeo-sdk-releases. PREFER the bundled SDK in the Unreal plugin release over this — only use this repo for the legacy git-submodule path.
ludeoCSdk.note: USE THE BUNDLED C SDK. It ships inside the LudeoUESDK release zip (plugin 4.3.1 bundles CoreSDK 4.2.2) — already populated at Source/LudeoSDK/SDK/, so the release-zip path needs NO separate C SDK acquisition. The standalone repo (ludeo-labs/sdk-releases) does publish a `LudeoCoreSDK_v<ver>.zip` asset (latest v4.2.2), but acquire it separately ONLY for the legacy git-submodule path (add as a nested submodule into Source/LudeoSDK/SDK). The bundled path via ludeo-labs/unreal-plugin-releases is the definitive source.
